summary: Comprehensive testing of new Scan tab feature for AI vision-based prop extraction from PrizePicks screenshots. All backend and frontend tests passed. The feature correctly extracts player props using GPT-4o vision, resolves players via API-Sports, and displays results with MATCHED/NO MATCH badges.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/scan-prop extracts 3 player props from test image (Saka, Haaland, Rodri)
Backend: Extracted players are resolved via API-Sports with playerId, teamId, teamName
Backend: Prop types are normalized to valid keys (pass_attempts, shots, tackles)
Backend: Empty/invalid base64 handled gracefully without server crash
Frontend: Bottom nav shows all 4 tabs (Predict, Tracking, Scan, Guide)
Frontend: Scan tab has Camera icon in nav
Frontend: Upload zone visible with drag & drop support
Frontend: File input accepts image uploads
Frontend: Scanning spinner appears with 'Analyzing screenshot...' message
Frontend: 3 Props Detected after image scan
Frontend: Each prop card shows player name, team, prop type, line, MATCHED badge
Frontend: Player photos from API-Sports displayed
Frontend: RUN PREDICTION button visible and enabled for matched players
Frontend: RUN PREDICTION button shows ANALYZING... state when clicked
Frontend: X button on image preview resets scan
Frontend: Scan Again button works to reset
Frontend: Existing tabs (Predict, Tracking, Guide) still work and are unaffected
critical_code_review_comments: Scan feature implementation is complete with proper AI vision integration
GPT-4o vision correctly extracts player names, prop types, and lines from screenshots
API-Sports player resolution works with last-name fallback for better matching
All data-testid attributes properly set for testing
Bottom nav correctly shows 4 tabs with Camera icon on Scan

test_credentials.owner_email: josselj001@gmail.com (auto-login via verify-whop, no password needed)
test_credentials.test_image: /tmp/test_prizepicks.png (synthetic PrizePicks screenshot with Saka, Haaland, Rodri)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Scan tab feature fully tested. The feature uses GPT-4o vision via Emergent LLM Key to analyze PrizePicks screenshots and extract player props. Players are resolved via API-Sports search with last-name fallback. Test image at /tmp/test_prizepicks.png contains 3 Premier League players: Saka (Pass Attempts 28.5), Haaland (Shots 3.5), Rodri (Tackles 2.5). All 3 were correctly extracted and matched. RUN PREDICTION button triggers the full prediction flow (takes 30-45 seconds).

scan_tab_in_nav.description: Scan tab with Camera icon visible in bottom nav between Tracking and Guide

upload_zone.description: Drag & drop upload zone with 'CHOOSE IMAGE' button

ai_vision_extraction.description: GPT-4o vision extracts playerName, propType, line, overUnder, opponentName, league, leagueId

api_sports_resolution.description: Players resolved via API-Sports with playerId, teamId, teamName, photo

prop_cards.description: Each card shows player photo, name, team, prop type, line, OVER/UNDER, MATCHED/NO MATCH badge

run_prediction_button.description: RUN PREDICTION button enabled for matched players, shows ANALYZING... state

reset_functionality.description: X button and Scan Again button both reset to upload zone

existing_tabs_unaffected.description: Predict, Tracking, Guide tabs all work correctly
